overall.description: A hooded character stands on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountainous landscape at sunset in a video game scene. The sun silhouettes a distinctive flat-topped mountain in the distance while golden light illuminates the clouds and a lake visible in the valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

agents.ego_description: The hooded character stands at the cliff edge, occasionally shifting weight and turning head to survey the vast mountainous landscape, with cloak billowing slightly in the wind.

entered.detail: Distinctive mountain with flat summit silhouetted against the setting sun, dominating the horizon
Layered mountain ridges fading into atmospheric haze on the left side
Rocky mountain slopes descending toward the valley on the right
Calm body of water nestled in the valley below, reflecting golden light
Stone outcrop where the character stands, with rough texture and sparse grass
Small structures or ruins visible in the valley near the lake shore

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless on a rocky cliff overlooking a breathtaking vista. A distinctive flat-topped mountain dominates the center horizon, backlit by the golden sun, while layered mountain ranges extend to the sides and a calm lake sits in the valley below. The warm light of golden hour bathes the entire scene in amber tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative gaze over a vast mountainous landscape bathed in the amber glow of a sunset. It begins with a hooded character standing motionless on a rocky cliff, overlooking a breathtaking vista where a distinctive flat-topped mountain dominates the center horizon. As the camera lingers, the golden sun continues to backlight the peak, casting deep silhouettes across the layered mountain ranges that extend to the sides. The scene then expands to reveal a calm lake nestled in the valley below, while the warm light of the golden hour intensifies across the entire environment.
